title: Battle of Cerea
content: {{Top|leg}} {{Battle |prev= |conc= |next= |image= |name=Battle of Cerea |conflict=[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]'' |date=[[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]]{{FactFile2014|40|CER 1-2|Cerea}} {{C|14:8-14:9 GrS}} |place=[[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]] |result=*Republic victory *Many civilians killed |side1=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] *[[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] military |side2=*[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] **[[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[President/Legends|President]] [[Bo-Ro-Tara]] † *[[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]] |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*[[Clone trooper/Legends|Clone troopers]] *[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] *[[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] military forces |forces2=*[[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s *[[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]] *[[Gossam Commandos/Legends|Gossam Commandos]] *[[OG-9 homing spider droid/Legends|OG-9 homing spider droids]] *[[DSD1 dwarf spider droid/Legends|DSD1 dwarf spider droids]] *[[A-DSD advanced dwarf spider droid|Advanced dwarf spider droids]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=Bo-Ro-Tara murdered |casual2=Some [[Droid/Legends|droids]] |casual3= |casual4= |civilian=*1,000,000 civilians{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/livingforce/swlf20041223|text=Disapproval|int=Disapproval}} **[[Mundi family]] (except [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]])"''There may have been no body ''to'' recover. That was the case when my family was killed during the Battle of Cerea. I also found it difficult to accept, but I had to if I was going to stay true to our beliefs.|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]]|[[Republic 62|''Republic'' 62]]}} The '''Battle of Cerea''' was a month-long battle that took place on the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] world of [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]]. The paradise world was ravaged by [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]] forces until defeated by the Republic. The battle ended when [[Bo-Ro-Tara]] was assassinated by [[Gossam Commandos/Legends|Gossam Commandos]]. It was also during the battle that the Cerean [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]] lost [[Mundi family|his family]]. {{Battle-stub}} ==Appearances== *[[Republic 62|''Republic'' 62]] {{Mo}} *{{InsiderCite|70|Republic HoloNet News Core Edition 14:9:04}} {{1stm}} *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/livingforce/swlf20041223|text=Disapproval|int=Disapproval}} ==Sources== *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{DB|character|tarrseirr|Seirr, Tarr}} *{{FactFile2014|40|CER 1-2|Cerea}} *[[Star Wars: Force and Destiny Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Force and Destiny'' Core Rulebook]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht um Cerea |es=Batalla de Cerea |deGA=1 }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Cerea, Battle of}} [[Category:Battles of Cerea]] [[Category:Battles of the Clone Wars]]
